scripts.build: bun run --filter @noyzi/core build && bun run --filter @noyzi/react build && bun run --filter web build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @noyzi/core build && bun run --filter '@noyzi/*' test && bun run --filter web test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@noyzi/*' typecheck && bun run --filter web typecheck
